Header.title: Hansal Patel
Header.paragraph: Aspiring Cybersecurity Professional & Computer Engineering Student. Specialized in penetration testing, security tooling, and AI-driven security solutions.

About.paragraph: I am a Computer Engineering student at A.D. Patel Institute of Technology (CPI: 9.03) with a passion for cybersecurity. My experience ranges from building custom security toolkits for Kali Linux to developing AI-enabled interview platforms and travel planners. I focus on vulnerability assessment, network analysis, and secure application development.

Project1.title: Cybersecurity Toolkit for Kali Linux (CyberToolkit)
Project1.description: Built a comprehensive CLI-based penetration testing toolkit covering recon, attack simulation, and data protection. It integrates a Network Scanner (CyberSniffer), Phishing Tool, URL Inspector, Secure File Sharing, DDoS simulator, RDP auditing, and Wordlist Generator (CUPP). Designed with a modular, menu-driven architecture for streamlined execution on Kali Linux.
Project1.overview: CyberToolkit is a centralized, modular security platform developed in a Linux environment to streamline penetration testing, threat detection, and vulnerability assessments. Written primarily in Python and Bash, the toolkit aggregates critical offensive and defensive utilities into a single, cohesive workflow. It includes integrations with tools like zaproxy and custom scripts (CyberSniffer.py, RDP.py, URLInspect.py) enabling security analysts to simulate real-world attacks, audit network defenses, and analyze web vulnerabilities efficiently.

capabilities.title: Intelligence & Profiling Engine
capabilities.text: Integrates targeted OSINT and dictionary-generation frameworks (including the Common User Passwords Profiler - CUPP) to simulate credential-harvesting vulnerabilities based on custom behavioral profiles.

capabilities.title: Active Defense & Detection
capabilities.text: Features a real-time phishing detection engine (phishing_detector.py) and a URL inspection utility (URLInspect.py) that programmatically evaluates web domains to intercept social engineering vectors.

capabilities.title: Network Auditing & Traffic Analysis
capabilities.text: Equipped with localized packet sniffing (CyberSniffer.py), protocol-specific auditing utilities (RDP.py), and a DDoS simulation script (DDos.py) to test infrastructure resilience against traffic inflation and unauthorized access.

capabilities.title: Secure Infrastructure & Web Testing
capabilities.text: Includes secure file-sharing mechanisms (secure_file_sharer.py), rapid deployment automation (setup.sh, File_Transfer.sh), and integration with web application security scanners like zaproxy.

Project2.title: AI Placement Preparation Suite (Careerly)
Project2.description: Engineered an all-in-one AI placement suite designed for next-generation hiring. Features comprehensive modules for Aptitude Assessments, Technical Coding challenges, and AI Mock Interviews, all protected by a military-grade AI proctoring system.
Project2.overview: Careerly (formerly Interview IQ) is a state-of-the-art placement preparation platform. It provides candidates with an immersive environment to master logical reasoning, solve complex coding challenges across multiple languages, and experience realistic, high-pressure behavioral and technical AI mock interviews. The platform incorporates a robust anti-cheat protocol, ensuring exam integrity with tab-switch detection and fullscreen lock.

capabilities.title: AI Mock Interviews
capabilities.text: Experience realistic, high-pressure interview scenarios with in-depth behavioral and technical AI analysis.

capabilities.title: Technical Excellence Editor
capabilities.text: Solve complex coding challenges across multiple languages with instant execution results and logic efficiency analysis.

capabilities.title: Aptitude Assessment Engine
capabilities.text: Master logical reasoning and quantitative math with real-time scoring and comprehensive analytics.

capabilities.title: Military-Grade Exam Security
capabilities.text: AI-driven proctoring system featuring auto-submission, tab-switch detection, fullscreen lock, and disabled copy-paste.

screenshots.caption: Careerly Landing Page & Secure Hiring Proposition
AI Enabled General Aptitude Test Configuration

Project3.title: AI Travel Planner (VagaWise)
Project3.description: Developed a full-stack AI travel planner that crafts personalized itineraries and budget allocations. Implemented Firebase-backed authentication and secure API communication, integrating third-party APIs with robust input validation to prevent unauthorized access.
Project3.overview: VagaWise is a smart, budget-conscious travel itinerary planner designed to automate trip coordination. Using Gemini AI, it generates complete travel routes, lodging recommendations, and daily activity logs. The system features custom budget allocation algorithms that dynamically calculate cost-of-living adjustments for target destinations, giving users realistic, stress-free travel plans.

capabilities.title: Intelligent Itinerary Builder
capabilities.text: Generates location-aware daily schedules and mapping suggestions using semantic city-by-city route optimization.

capabilities.title: Dynamic Budget Allocation Engine
capabilities.text: Splits trip budgets into hotel, dining, transit, and leisure tiers based on cost-of-living indices and user preference curves.

capabilities.title: Historical Trip Archives & Synchronization
capabilities.text: Synchronizes local storage data with Firestore to persist plans, enabling instant offline access and seamless multi-device updates.

capabilities.title: Secure Third-Party API Integration
capabilities.text: Encapsulates external API endpoints with rate-limiting and validation layers to defend backend integrity.
